title: Trenčín, Trenčín Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Trenčín, Trenčín Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Trenčín is a city in Trenčín Region with a population of 55,593. One of Slovakia’s most picturesque towns, dominated by the magnificent Trenčín Castle perched on a cliff, with a charming old town and a vibrant cultural scene.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
